source: Mill 19 Rubble (Mega-NeRF), 1678 images at 4x downscale, shipped PixSfM poses fixed
pipeline: SIFT (CPU) -> sequential+spatial matching -> colmap point_triangulator (OPENCV model, no pose BA)
axis_convention: Mega-NeRF down/right/backward derived; axis 1 is vertical
note: pinhole comparison arm removed: DB cameras are OPENCV; kPinhole-vs-kOpenCV CHECK crash
